columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: OBJECT_GUID
columns.Comments: Speicifies the object GUID. Primarily used for seed data framework.

columns.Name: ALERT_ID
columns.Comments: Alert Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERTS_B.ALERT_ID

columns.Name: ENABLED
columns.Comments: Determines if the Templatet is enabled or disabled. Valid values are based on the lookup type YES_NO and the default value is Y.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_NAME
columns.Comments: The Resource Name.

columns.Name: MIME_TYPE
columns.Comments: Valid values are based on the lookup of ORA_HRC_ALERT_MIME_TYPE. The default value should be HTML.

columns.Name: NT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Non translatable flag identifies the location of the message body either in the base or translation source.

columns.Name: NT_BODY
columns.Comments: Non translatable message body definition.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Specifies the default language to be used by the template.

columns.Name: ALERT_PER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the number of notifications to send for a resource. Valid values are either one per Record or one per Recordset and based on the lookup of HRC_ALERT_PER_TYPE. The Row value can be selected for any resource. The Rowset can only be selected for child collection resources.

columns.Name: RUN_EXPRESSION
columns.Comments: Specifies an expression to determine if a template should run.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTES
columns.Comments: System maintained list of Attributes (names) used for Short Message/Subject/Body for an Event Alert.

columns.Name: STORE_MESSAGES
columns.Comments: Specifies if a generated message should be stored for a run. The defau;lt value is Y.

columns.Name: GROUPBY_EXPRESSION
columns.Comments: To store the groupby expression which would group the template messages

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Used to identify for soft delete.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
